name: education_policy_predictive_queue_stonehaven_lib_eq
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Education Policy, the situation tagged internally around education policy predictive queue stonehaven lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. Framing has already hardened externally as liberty against equality; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Fatima Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Fatima Kowalski, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Education Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Talia Kaur
agents.identity: I am Talia Kaur, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Education Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with equality.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to equality to preserve operational liberty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Fatima Kowalski must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Fatima Kowalski do?
